artPrompt: A colossal winged demon gambler lounges upon a smoldering throne high in the wide frame, vast leathery wings spread, casting glowing dice from one clawed hand as embers rain around him over a carnival pit below. Hot-gold and carnival-red light pools at his feet; the rest of his bulk sinks into smoky black. One infernal light source carves his grin, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: High Roller of the Inferno
text:
Flying
Whenever a player rolls one or more dice (yours, theirs, anyone's), High Roller of the Inferno gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the highest single result rolled.
At the beginning of your end step, if High Roller's power is 13 or greater, each opponent loses 3 life. The whales always tip in blood.
flavorText: He bets in lifespans and tips in decades. The pit boss comps him a throne.

extras.dice: grows off the highest die rolled by anyone
